_comment: Flow 04 — EU cross-country departure at Grenchen LSZG. Mirrors docs/xpwellysatc_manual_en.md §6 Phase 1 (LSZG departure). Key difference vs. pattern flight: pilot says 'on course' → READY_FOR_DEPARTURE_VFR → Tower clears with 'on course approved, frequency change approved when airborne'. Leaves the Tower frequency → EN_ROUTE.
name: EU cross-country departure — LSZG

say.text: Grenchen Ground Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo from parking request taxi

say.note: Step 2 — Ground: ready for departure VFR on course
say.text: Grenchen Ground Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo holding short ready for departure on course
Grenchen Tower Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo ready for departure on course

say.note: Step 4 — Tower: leaving frequency, enter en-route silence
say.text: Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo leaving your frequency good day
